title: HOMESHOPA Plastic Mixing Bowl, 2 Pack 5 Litre Reusable Kitchen Cooking Serving Bowl, Non Slip Base, Compact & Stackable, Popcorn Salad Bowl for Food Prep Baking, Dishwasher Safe, 28cm Clear
features: KITHEN MUST HAVE: On the one hand, it must be functional and meet our needs, while also being versatile enough to be used for a variety of dishes. Our mixing bowl meets these requirements; it is ideal for serving salads, mixing dough ingredients, and serving salty snacks such as popcorn while watching a movie.

HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL: Made of high quality food safe plastic, this plastic kitchen mixing and serving bowl is ideal for a variety of cooking and baking tasks. The diameter of this chip and dip serving bowl is 28cm, and it is dishwasher safe.

NESTING AND NON-SLIP DESIGN: These 5 litre round salad bowls nest to save cabinet space and can also be stacked in the refrigerator. During mixing, the non-slip bottom prevents the bowl from slipping or sliding. It makes cooking easier.

DISHWASHER SAFE: Cleaning this plastic baking and cooking bowl is simple and quick; simply flip it over and wash it, or toss it into the dishwasher. It is recommended to place in the top rack of the dishwasher.

MULTIPURPOSE FOR ALL YOUR BAKING NEEDS: Everything is easier when you have the right tools, and this large mixing bowl is ready to go to work in your kitchen. These meal prep bowl is ideal for baking a delicious breakfast, bread for lunch, or a show-stopping cake.
description: Product Description Versatile Oasis Mixing and Serving Bowls: Elevate Your Culinary Experience! Elevate your kitchen aesthetic and culinary prowess with our Oasis Mixing and Serving Bowl Set. Crafted from premium, durable plastic, these bowls effortlessly blend functionality with style, making them a must-have in every kitchen. Upgrade your kitchen essentials with the perfect balance of style and functionality. Our Stylish Plastic Mixing and Serving Bowl – where versatility meets elegance.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Dishwasher Safe, Lead Free, Outdoor Safe, Shatterproof, Unbreakable
